title: SloppyNode Mesh + Shared Projects Execution Tasks

statusLegend.done: Implemented and covered enough to build on.
statusLegend.partial: Some foundations exist, but the plan definition of done is not satisfied.
statusLegend.blocked: Cannot proceed without a prior phase or external decision.

currentSnapshot.summary: The repository has a local mesh model/store, SloppyNode identity, relay websocket routing with challenge auth, a NodeMeshClient, scoped RPC handlers, remote task lifecycle, worker Git execution policy, and dashboard mesh UX.
implementedHighlights: Node identity, keypair generation, signing helpers, config persistence.
Local NodeMeshStore for nodes, invites, shared projects, tasks, envelopes, audit log.
CLI commands for node init/status/join/list, network-create, shared-project create/attach/list, task create/list/status, rpc-request, audit-log.
Relay websocket endpoint /v1/node/mesh/ws with hello, heartbeat, online/offline, targeted routing.
NodeMeshClient outbound websocket loop with hello, heartbeat, reconnect, and basic RPC responses.
Basic RPC methods: node.ping, node.status, node.capabilities, project.status stub.
Structured relay error response for unavailable target nodes.
RPC request manager with request/response correlation and timeout handling.
Typed mesh permission values and relay-side scoped RPC authorization.
Shared project update/remove-member operations and shared_project.list/get RPC handlers.
project.status reports local shared project path, Git branch/dirty state, and mesh tasks.
Worker execution can run through an injected autopilot adapter, create task branches, commit, push, and report branch/commit/tests/summary.
Core API exposes mesh nodes, shared projects, members, tasks, and audit log.
Dashboard Nodes view lists mesh nodes/projects and supports remote task assignment and review-state inspection.
mainGaps: Live CLI RPC over relay is still limited to the implemented request/response path.
End-to-end production deployment still needs CI-parity/full-suite verification.

phases.title: Node Identity and Daemon
phases.goal: A node can initialize itself, persist identity locally, and run as a foreground daemon.
definitionOfDone: sloppy-node init creates config with node identity.
Node keypair and node id are generated.
sloppy-node status prints local identity and state.
sloppy-node start can run in foreground.

phases.title: VPS Relay and Persistent Connections
phases.goal: Laptop and home Mac maintain outbound websocket connections to a relay, and the relay tracks online/offline status.
definitionOfDone: Relay accepts websocket mesh connections.
Nodes send node.hello and node.heartbeat.
Relay routes envelopes by target node id.
Relay can persist online/offline status.
Production VPS flow supports secure WSS/TLS.

remainingTasks.title: Wire NodeMeshRelay to a configured persistent store in CoreRouter/CoreService
remainingTasks.description: The relay supports an injected NodeMeshStore, but the default websocket route currently constructs the relay without an explicit store. Add a configured mesh state path and use it for production relay persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Core config exposes a mesh state path or equivalent relay persistence setting.
Default /v1/node/mesh/ws route uses the configured store.
Tests do not write to ~/.sloppy.

remainingTasks.title: Add VPS/public relay startup flow
remainingTasks.description: Add CLI/config support for running a SloppyNode/Core relay with a public URL suitable for VPS deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: A documented command starts a relay/coordinator process with public URL metadata.
Local tests can start a relay without requiring real TLS certificates.

phases.title: Invite Flow and Challenge Authentication
phases.goal: New nodes join with a one-time invite, then future websocket connections authenticate with node keys.
definitionOfDone: Invite token creation exists.
Node join consumes invite and registers public key.
Relay sends nonce challenge on websocket connection.
Node signs nonce with private key.
Relay verifies signature against registered public key.
Unknown or invalid nodes are rejected before route attach.

remainingTasks.title: Add mesh auth challenge message types
remainingTasks.description: Extend mesh protocol with challenge and auth response frames so auth is typed instead of inferred from payload strings.
acceptanceCriteria: MeshMessageType includes auth challenge/auth response or an equivalent typed auth frame.
Payload schema includes nonce, node id, public key reference, and signature.

remainingTasks.title: Make NodeMeshClient sign relay challenges
remainingTasks.description: When the relay sends a nonce challenge, the client signs it with NodeIdentity.privateKey and sends an auth response before normal hello/routing.
acceptanceCriteria: Client auth response contains node id, signature, and public key or key id.
Client does not send normal RPC/task responses before auth completes.

remainingTasks.title: Make NodeMeshRelay verify signed challenge before attach
remainingTasks.description: Relay should load the registered node public key from NodeMeshStore, verify the signature, and reject unknown or invalid nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Unknown node cannot become active.
Wrong signature cannot become active.
Valid registered node can become active.
Rejected websocket receives a structured auth error or closes cleanly.

phases.title: Message Routing and RPC
phases.goal: Nodes can call basic RPC methods through the relay and receive clean responses or timeouts.
definitionOfDone: Envelope routing by target node id works.
RPC request/response correlation exists.
RPC timeout handling exists.
node.ping, node.capabilities, node.status, project.status work.
Failures are reported cleanly.

remainingTasks.title: Add RPC request manager with correlation and timeout
remainingTasks.description: Create a small client-side RPC manager that sends rpc.request envelopes, waits for matching rpc.response requestId, and fails with timeout when no response arrives.
acceptanceCriteria: Callers can await a response for a request id.
Timeout returns a typed error.
Late responses do not leak continuations.

remainingTasks.title: Make rpc-request optionally send over live relay
remainingTasks.description: The existing rpc-request command stores an envelope locally. Add a live mode that connects to relay, sends the request, waits for response, and prints JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI supports live RPC through relay without polling mesh.json.
Timeout and unavailable target are printed clearly.

remainingTasks.title: Replace project.status stub with real shared project status
remainingTasks.description: project.status should report local repo path, branch, dirty state, and active/running mesh tasks for the requested shared project.
acceptanceCriteria: project.status reads sharedProjectId from params.
Response includes localRepoPath when the node is a member.
Response includes gitBranch/dirty fields when repo exists.

phases.title: ACL and Audit Log
phases.goal: Remote operations are authorized by node/project permissions and audited.
definitionOfDone: Unauthorized RPC is denied.
Every remote action is recorded.
Remote shell/files/agent execution require explicit dangerous permissions.

remainingTasks.title: Define typed mesh permissions
remainingTasks.description: Replace ad hoc permission strings in control flow with typed permission values or documented constants.
acceptanceCriteria: Permissions include project.read, project.write, task.create, task.assign, task.update, node.rpc, node.shell, node.agent.spawn, node.files.read, node.files.write, node.relay.
Tests cover permission encoding compatibility.

remainingTasks.title: Authorize RPC routing at relay/store boundary
remainingTasks.description: Before forwarding rpc.request, check whether the source node has permission to call the method/scope on the target node.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthorized RPC returns structured forbidden response.
Denied RPC is written to audit log with allowed=false.
Allowed RPC is forwarded normally.

remainingTasks.title: Gate dangerous remote operations
remainingTasks.description: Remote shell, file access, computer/browser control, and agent spawn must be disabled unless explicit permissions are present.
acceptanceCriteria: node.shell is required for remote exec.
node.files.read/write are required for remote file access.
node.agent.spawn is required for remote autopilot task execution.

phases.title: Shared Project Entity
phases.goal: Shared project metadata is first-class and visible to connected nodes.
definitionOfDone: Shared project create/update/list exists.
Repo URL and default branch are stored.
Per-node local paths are stored.
Nodes can query their local shared project config.
Project metadata is visible over mesh.

remainingTasks.title: Add shared project update/remove member operations
remainingTasks.description: Create explicit update APIs for project metadata and member removal so shared projects can evolve after creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Project name/repo/defaultBranch/policies can be updated.
Members can be removed.
Audit log records updates/removals.

remainingTasks.title: Add shared_project.list and shared_project.get RPC methods
remainingTasks.description: Connected nodes should be able to query shared project metadata through RPC rather than only local mesh.json.
acceptanceCriteria: shared_project.list returns projects visible to caller.
shared_project.get returns a single project by id or name.
Unauthorized caller receives forbidden response.

remainingTasks.title: Publish project.sync events for shared project metadata changes
remainingTasks.description: When shared project metadata changes, relay should publish project.sync/event.publish frames to affected nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Project changes produce scoped event envelopes.
Only project members receive project-scoped events.

phases.title: Remote Task Dispatch Lifecycle
phases.goal: A task assigned to a remote node is delivered through relay, claimed by worker, and emits lifecycle status.
definitionOfDone: Laptop can create a task assigned to home Mac.
Home Mac receives task.dispatch without polling.
Worker sends task.claimed, task.started, task.progress, task.blocked, task.ready_for_review.
Laptop CLI/UI sees state changes.

remainingTasks.title: Forward task.dispatch to connected target nodes
remainingTasks.description: When a task is created for a connected node, relay should send the task.dispatch envelope to that node instead of only recording it in mesh.json.
acceptanceCriteria: Connected worker receives task.dispatch frame.
Offline worker produces clean queued/offline status or error.
Audit log records dispatch delivery result.

remainingTasks.title: Add NodeMeshClient worker handler for task.dispatch
remainingTasks.description: Worker should parse task.dispatch, persist/ack it locally, and emit task.claimed then task.started/task.progress as appropriate.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker sends task.claimed for accepted dispatch.
Worker rejects unknown project/member config cleanly.
Status updates include task id, project id, node id, and status.

remainingTasks.title: Ingest remote task status updates on relay/controller
remainingTasks.description: Relay/controller should update task records when receiving task.status.update frames from worker nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: task.claimed/started/progress/blocked/ready_for_review update MeshTaskRecord.
Updates are audited.
Controller can observe updated task state.

phases.title: Git Execution Policy and Remote Autopilot
phases.goal: A worker executes assigned work in its local repo using branch-per-task policy and reports branch/commit/tests.
definitionOfDone: Worker verifies clean worktree before starting.
Worker creates branch agent/{nodeName}/{taskId}-{slug}.
Worker runs project-scoped autopilot/agent.
Worker commits and pushes result branch.
Direct push to main is prevented.
Result report includes branch, commit, tests, summary.

remainingTasks.title: Implement local Git policy checker
remainingTasks.description: Create a worker-side helper that checks repo exists, clean worktree, default branch, direct push policy, and branch naming.
acceptanceCriteria: Dirty worktree blocks execution by default.
Branch name follows agent/{nodeName}/{taskId}-{slug}.
directPushToMain=false is enforced.

remainingTasks.title: Add worker branch/commit/push execution shell
remainingTasks.description: Worker should create a task branch, run configured commands or agent hook, commit changes, push branch, and report result metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker creates branch before execution.
Worker records command/test outcomes.
Worker reports branch and commit in task.ready_for_review.

remainingTasks.title: Connect worker task execution to Sloppy agent/autopilot
remainingTasks.description: Replace placeholder execution with a project-scoped Sloppy agent/autopilot invocation using the worker localRepoPath.
acceptanceCriteria: Remote worker launches the selected agent/autopilot for the assigned task.
Task progress streams back to controller.
Ready-for-review result includes branch/commit/tests/summary.

phases.title: Dashboard and UX Integration
phases.goal: User can inspect nodes, shared projects, remote task execution, and ready-for-review branches from the dashboard.
definitionOfDone: Dashboard shows node list and statuses.
Dashboard shows shared project members and local path mapping.
Task creation can assign to node.
Remote execution timeline is visible.
Ready-for-review branch/commit display is visible.

remainingTasks.title: Expose mesh nodes/projects/tasks over Core API
remainingTasks.description: Add HTTP API endpoints for mesh nodes, shared projects, members, tasks, and audit log.
acceptanceCriteria: GET endpoints list nodes, shared projects, mesh tasks, and audit entries.
POST/PATCH endpoints create/update shared projects and dispatch tasks.
API uses typed models rather than raw JSON strings.

remainingTasks.title: Add dashboard views for nodes and shared projects
remainingTasks.description: Create dashboard screens/components to inspect node status and shared project membership.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard lists online/offline/degraded nodes.
Dashboard displays roles and capabilities.
Dashboard displays shared project members and local paths.

remainingTasks.title: Add dashboard remote task assignment and review state
remainingTasks.description: Extend task UI so a task can be assigned to a mesh node and remote lifecycle/branch result is visible.
acceptanceCriteria: Task create/edit supports assign-to-node.
Remote status timeline displays claimed/started/progress/blocked/ready_for_review.
Ready-for-review branch and commit are visible.

mvpDefinitionOfDoneChecklist.text: A VPS SloppyNode can run as relay/bootstrap/coordinator.
A home Mac can join the network without public IP.
A laptop can join the same network.
sloppy-node list shows all nodes and statuses.
A shared project can be created with one repoUrl.
Each node can have its own localRepoPath for the same shared project.
A task can be assigned to the home Mac node.
The home Mac receives the task through the relay.
The home Mac runs the task in its local environment.
The home Mac creates a task branch.
The home Mac pushes the branch to Git.
The laptop receives a ready_for_review event.
Audit logs record all remote actions.
